_doc: The failing job's robot account (UIPATH\SVCRENEW). LoginToConsole=false rules out the HD-console-contention branch (branch 2). RunOnlyOneJobAtATime=false is irrelevant here because the concurrent jobs belong to OTHER accounts — this is not a per-user single-interactive-job collision. Credential is current (no rotation), confirming the fault is session seating, not logon.
